title: Best Oasis Weekly Recycling Market Report, 28 July 2023
section_path: Best Oasis Weekly Recycling Market Report, 28 July 2023
section_path_text: Best Oasis Weekly Recycling Market Report, 28 July 2023
summary:
Main
in Weekly Demolition Reports 28/07/2023
The 11th edition of the European List of ship recycling facilities has been adopted by the European Commission,
Source: Best Oasis Limited

Linked asset: 2023-07-28_Weekly-Ship-Recycling-Report-21-July-28-July-2023.pdf
Source asset: reports/hellenic/demolition/pdfs/2023-07-28_Weekly-Ship-Recycling-Report-21-July-28-July-2023.pdf

[Page 1]
Weekly
Ship Recycling
Report
21 July 2023 - 28 July 2023
Visit : www.best-oasis.com Head Office: 3201, Saba Tower 1, Cluster E, Jumeirah Lake Towers, Dubai, U.A.E
Email: bol@bol.ae Contact: +971 4575 4667

[Page 2]
Highlights of the Week
The 11th edition of the European List of ship recycling facilities has been adopted by the European Commission, encompassing a total of 48 yards. The updated
list comprises three additional yards situated in Turkiye. The Commission has further prolonged the expiration date for the inclusion of two yards listed in
Denmark and one yard listed in Italy.
